name: M&T Bank Corporation Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series H
summary: M&T Bank Corporation Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series H represents ownership in M&T Bank's preferred stock. The Series H preferred shares pay a fixed dividend until a specified date, after which the dividend rate becomes floating. The dividends are non-cumulative, meaning any unpaid dividends do not accrue.
